channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pavement inaccessible as being used for business storage, 16th June
item.description:
At the junction of Hamilton St and London Rd. Items belonging to the Wine Bar left permanently on the pedestrian pavement. Furniture, stacked beer kegs, bins, rubbish and a plant pot. Long term, ongoing issue, (months but more extensive in recent weeks) reported numerous times but no action taken. All pedestrians, including those with mobility aids forced into the road. Plus it's an eye sore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Hamilton Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: Grate rattles very loudly when a vehicle goes over it. Probably due to deterioration of the asphalt., 16th June
item.description:
On the roundabout at the entrance to Brookbank Close on Honeybourne Way. See attached picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millbrook Roundabout, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 6 inch pothole on pavement on southbound A38, 16th June
item.description:
Pothole is located on the pavement alongside the farmer's field, W3W braved.ironclad.career It has been there since early May and is worsening. My children comment about it getting worse on their way to the bus.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown verge, 16th June
item.description:
Southbound on the A38 between Coombe Hill traffic lights and the bus stop opposite Pancake Lane (all the way along). Grass/weeds/stinging nettles overgrown along the verge to a point where my child has to walk into the road to get to the bus stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 16th June
item.description:
signage down on floor see image
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Signpost arms removed by contractors missing and not replaced, 16th June
item.description:
Sign Arms removed a number of years ago and not replaced. Directly opposite Conrdean lane junction close to Pike House. Drivers overshhot the junction and either reverse or miss the turn completely as they are unable to identify the road to Andoversford/Brockhampton/Belas Knap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 16th June
item.description:
